intro.title: Surgeons & Medical Professionals
intro.description:
Aesthetic Aftercare is an RN-led post-operative nursing and recovery support service based in Los Angeles. We provide private, one-on-one nursing support for patients following cosmetic and aesthetic procedures, strictly in accordance with the operating surgeon’s written post-operative instructions.
 
Our goal is to support safe recovery, reduce unnecessary ER visits, and provide continuity of care in a private setting.

hero.heading: RN Aftercare for Cosmetic & Aesthetic Surgery
hero.subheading: Supporting safe recovery, reducing unnecessary ER visits

items.text: Insured and operating within RN scope of practice
Serving Los Angeles and surrounding areas

services.text: RN-coordinated transport from surgical center to home, hotel, or recovery location
Post-operative monitoring and vital signs checks
Medication reminders and organization per surgeon orders
Drain, incision, and dressing observation per written instructions
Direct communication with surgical offices as indicated

points.text: We do not diagnose medical conditions
We do not alter surgeon orders
We do not replace post-operative follow-up care
We do not provide medical decision-making
All care is supportive and follows the surgeon’s post-operative plan

care_model.title: Care Model
care_model.description:
Patients engage Aesthetic Aftercare independently. Services are scheduled following a consultation and confirmation of post-operative instructions. Nursing care is provided in private homes, hotels, or recovery accommodations.
For medical concerns outside nursing scope, patients are directed to contact their surgeon or emergency services immediately.

points.text: All care provided by licensed Registered Nurses
Services remain within RN scope of practice
Medical consents and documentation managed through HIPAA-conscious workflows

consultation.title: Contact & Coordination
consultation.subtitle: For coordination, questions, or patient inquiries, please contact:
